interface.longDescription:
Find your perfect property in Portugal using everyday language. Skip the complex filters and search forms. With Imovirtual, simply describe what you're looking for - "3-bedroom house near good schools under €300k" or "modern apartment for rent downtown with parking."

Key features:
- Smart search 
- Describe your ideal property in natural language
- Instant results. Get matched listings for both sales and rentals
- Interactive refinement . Ask follow-up questions to narrow your search
- Property insights. Get detailed information about any listing and compare

Whether you're a first-time buyer or seasoned investor, Imovirtual makes property hunting as simple as having a conversation.
defaultPrompt: Show me 3 bedroom apartments in Lisbon below 1.500 eur
